name: Dream of YukiHana
short_description: A fan-made bullet hell shooting game featuring "Hololive 5th Generation" as the main characters, with "Yukihana Lamy" at the center of the story.
detailed_description:
■Game Introduction

This game is a fan-made work based on "Hololive Production."

The main characters are members of "Hololive 5th Generation," with the story centered around "Yukihana Lamy."

Due to the needs of the storyline, this game does not heavily reference the streaming-related jokes or settings of the real-life 5th generation members.

Additionally, original characters who are "non-Hololive members" also appear in this game.

As such, it is recommended to enjoy this game as "a parallel world story of the 5th generation,"

or as a fan-made work similar to the official Hololive project "Alternative."

■Story

Yukihana Lamy

One week after returning to her hometown, "Unylia,"

The white bear "Daifuku," who was supposed to stay by her side,

returned alone to seek help from her fellow members of the "5th Generation's."

According to Daifuku,

Lamy is trapped in "Taisetsu Mountain" in Unylia

and unable to escape.

Taisetsu Mountain is home to powerful animals and spirits,

making it an extremely dangerous place for humans.

Even the "Snow Clan" regards it as a forbidden land.

Thus,

"Shishiro Botan" , "Momosuzu Nene" and "Omaru Polka"

armed themselves with their respective weapons and,

together with Daifuku, headed to Taisetsu Mountain to rescue Lamy.

However...

What awaited them in Taisetsu Mountain was the killing intent of the animals and spirits.

And...

The secret of the Snow Clan.

■Game Features

The gameplay of this title is a "bullet hell (danmaku) shooting game."

Players must navigate through overwhelmingly dense bullet patterns from enemies, finding gaps to dodge and defeating the enemies in the process.

In dire situations, you can use bombs to break through the chaos.

For players who are not skilled with this type of game, an "Easy" mode is available with significantly reduced difficulty.

For those seeking a despair-inducing challenge beyond human limits, the "Ultra" mode is also an option.

Enjoy the "bullet hell" of this game to your heart's content.

■Controls

The game primarily uses the keyboard, with the following controls divided into two scenarios:

During Menu Navigation

Move options: ↑↓←→

Confirm selection: Z

Cancel selection: X

Skip cutscenes: A

During Gameplay

Move player character: ↑↓←→

Attack: Z

Use bomb: X

Slow movement: Shift

Pause: Q

reviews.review_text:
For a free Bullet Herr Shooter, that heavily reminds me of Touhou, this game is surprisingly good, including the music. It may have some technical issues here and there but nothing that would break the game. Definitely recommended.

Overall good but still needs more development and QOL updates. And maybe better key bindings.

Someone on discord posted this weird looking chinese cartoon video game, I believe its categorized as (((shmups)))? Played as some jester girl who shoots lasers, got mauled by North Korean White Bear who summoned satanic jewish rituals on my character and lost my first run of the game. Decided to not use continues to move on with my life.

So I saw a new free game,thought I'd give it a try.
First thing I notice?....You navigate the menu with arrow keys, not WASD. 
Okay, weird but I can adapt.

I want to choose my name? Arrows.
I want to select my character? Arrows.
Everything? ARROWS.

Then I think: 'Hey, let me take a screenshot for Steam.' I press F12 (the default Steam screenshot key).
Game restart.

Okay, maybe it was a one-time thing. I open the game again. Press F12. Crash. Again. And again. And again. I literally restarted the game 6 times just trying to take ONE screenshot.

7th time? I press F12... and Alt+F4 myself out of existence.

The game might be fun, I don't know. 
I spent more time restarting it than actually playing.

Also, if you're reading this, please check out my artwork!
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3668605748
I would appreciate some upvotes, awards, comments, and adding it to favorites!

No controller support for Dream of YukiHana.
Also cluncky.
